title: Wingman from TF&AL
description: This resource pack replaces crossbow with Wingman from games Titanfall, Titanfall 2, Apex Legend.
body:
This resource pack replaces crossbow with Wingman from games Titanfall, Titanfall 2, Apex Legends.

You can change emblem (creeper by default). Just create "emblem.png" and made your own emblem [​way: "assets\minecraft\textures\windman"].

Display shows what loaded in the weapon (arrow/firework/nothing).

In inventory/HUD you can see load or empty your weapon. If it "watching up" - empty.

No Optifine needed. 

Made with Blockbench.
